data.title: Trump announced that tariffs on China would be raised to 125%, and tariffs on friendly countries would be suspended and temporarily reduced to 10%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Trump announced that he would immediately impose a 125% tariff on China. At the same time, considering that more than 75 countries have actively negotiated with the United States on trade, currency and tariff-related issues, Trump decided to implement a 90-day tariff "suspension period" for these countries, during which the tariff will be significantly reduced to 10%. He stressed that the era of China's "wanton advantage" is no longer sustainable, and the United States and other countries no longer accept this situation.

data.title: Trump Temporarily Suspends Tariffs for 90 Days
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump has authorized a 90-day suspension of tariffs. This suspension applies to reciprocal tariffs and a 10% tariff rate. The suspension is effective immediately.
